ItacPersonItem.Notes: Apothecary, chemist, botanist, and herbalist of Cardinals Odoardo Farnese and Francesco Barberini. He was in touch with the Lincei in 1616, but was not a Linceo himself.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
